Preston Lane Kazmierski
is very resourceful, reliable, and responsive…
My husband and I hired him & if we ever need an attorney in the future, we will definitely be calling him back.

There are literally no words to describe the level of pain that I was in at the time I contacted the law offices of Dan Siler. The moment you find out the person you’ve shared your life with for 24 years has been lying and cheating and stealing from you for months. It’s the worst pain you’ll ever face walking into the offices of Dan Siler crushed and broken. He sat with me allowed me to cry. Dan listened. He took notes. He asked the right questions. He made me feel safe insecure and he assured me that he would look out for me and not allow me to be further hurt and taken advantage of. The attention to details, the specific questions to get the right answers, the heart behind his will to fight for me with something that I never expected. I cannot describe how scary it is to go into a courtroom and sit across from someone that you loved, but it’s so securing to be sitting next to Dan Siler, who is willing to be the shield to protect me to fight for me and to speak for me and to ask the right questions and to make sure that I was not alone. If you ever need help with family law, if you ever need help with marital law, Dan Siler is the person that you can lean on. He is the person that you can trust. He is a person that is not going to take everything that you have just so that he can make a name for himself. Dan Siler is honorable he’s trustworthy. He is loyal. He is kind he is caring and don’t get me started on Christina in the office as a woman and a person who’s also gone through what I’m going through she gave me hugs. She gave me love. She listened. She cared for my feelings she cared for my emotions. She didn’t make me feel wrong. They are truly a team that you can trust

There is so much good to say about everyone in this law firm. From the secretary Christina,  the very powerful intelligent paralegal Erica,  and one the most caring, knowledgeable attorney Dan Siler. I came to this office in despair and a nasty child custody/ divorce.  I have been let down by the MPD and was in an abusive/controlling relationship. My children and I lived in fear. Dan Siler fought for us and with him and his amazing staff seemed justice. Most lawyers care about the money and not so much about clients.  But, I can't say that about this firm. They listened to me and my kids.  And for Dan Siler, it became more of a person finally helping us. For once my children and I are not living in fear! I also want to mention how I was struggling financially and having medical issues.. Dan Siler has worked with me financially. Dan Siler is a very knowledgeable, caring, powerful,  and a very firm attorney.  His paralegal Erica,  has to be one of the most knowlgeable and  person i have ever met firmness person i have ever met. They are very knowledgeable and caring.  Couldn't recommend anyone better than this law firm.

Dan Siler and especially his paralegal Erica are amazing and on top of any issues before I’m aware of it. Pay the retainer and trust they are doing their job and some. They are resourceful and extremely knowledgeable. Hire him trust me. I’ve used Siler law firm once and will never go to another law firm.

I highly recommend Mr. Siler for any legal matter that you could be dealing with. He never makes you feel like you are just  another client. Speaks to you directly on the phone, the few times that I had to leave a message Mr.Siler got right back to me as promised! Always answers any question I may have asked. Just an all around caring attorney that you will be glad to have on your side!

reviews.text: Do NOT go with Lilly! She took $6500 and did absolutely NOTHING! I asked her for a work note so they could know what was going on and she sent me a note that didn’t even have her information. I asked her to put her information, she said she would. Weeks go by and I asked her about the note she said “well you told me to edit it” I said “yeah to add your information to it.” I asked her for an itemized bill of the $6500, she said “I’ll get it done.” To this day no itemized bill was given. She was supposed to submit an application and when I asked her if she had received documents she had asked me for she said yes. Well about 3 weeks go by and she asked me if “I sent the documents to her email that she had asked for” I said “what do you mean? Those documents were sent over 3 weeks ago have you not seen them?” That’s when I began to worry about her lying. She hadn’t even seen the document or filed the application. To this day I don’t even know if she filled it or not. But most importantly she did NOTHING for the father of my kids. I asked for proof of what she submitted, which included multiple legal documents ,over 5 times she was asked and NEVER provided proof of submission or receipt that would be given upon submission. Let’s talk about communication with her. She lacks communication skills. When she would be called she would reply with a “call you later” or “call you back in a few minutes.” She did not return calls, I would be the one calling and calling. I want a refund, maybe not all of it but a partial would be fair. She took fully advantage of the situation we were on. She doesn’t care about her clients. So go with someone else but not with Lilly Plummer.

Miss Plummer was concise, professional, and literally recommended to me by 3 different attorneys, one was an acting mediator for a judge. She won my case and I will forever be grateful 🙏 I have recommended her to all my friends/coworkers looking to hire representation for family matters. Trust me, shes not " One of the good ones" She's the BEST OUT THERE.

Most unprofessional unproductive lawyer I’ve ever encountered. Took over $10,000 did not do any of the work. Now legal fees to clean up the mess she created are unbelievable. Definitely would NOT recommend using her for any services. She will take your money and never provide you with services. She needs to be disbarred
They could not help with the case that I have
great blessed to have lilly a. plummer on my case  thank you ..for your time on my case..

BJ Brown is at this moment my sons court appointed attorney. He has been in Ector County Detention Center since August 2020. She has not (once seen him). I make calls to her a she refers me as God another mommy call. She's very rude very unprofessional.

If I could give a negative 5 stars I would. She represented my daughter a few years back when she was assigned as a court appointed attorney for my daughter.  It was 3 weeks before she even contacted her. After that it was impossible to get in touch with her she would not answer nor return any phone calls.  3 weeks before my daughter's court date my daughter filed a complaint and request for a new attorney. When BJ found out she was livid. She called my daughter and started yelling and screaming at her about how could she change attorneys. The xchange didn't go as she planned because my daughter yelled back at her and told her she was useless and unproductive and should have her licence revoked. When I finally saw her one day in court I was shocked at her appearance. It looked as though she slept in her clothes and had not washed her hair in months. Please do not ever ever ever retain this woman as your attorney, And if she's appointed as your Court Appointed lawyer please ask for another one as soon as you can.

I called this office to see if this was the office of B. J. Brown because I did not know she was a female and she couldn't even let me know that she was B. J.  Brown. reviews.text:
TL;DR : Lane is such a bad attorney that when I talked to our new attorney the same way I had to with Lane, she thought I was insulting her intelligence. Lane has absolutely no idea what he's doing or worse, he just doesn't care.

Still won't get back to us after multiple months, cost us 17 months of make up time for not siting the required law and also didn't site the law that states the petitioner is required to pay all court costs and attorneys fees for both parties if found to have committed contempt, which is easily provable. Not sure what's going on with him, but clearly he has no interest in communicating.

Editing as of 6/25: Do not give this man your money, you'd get better legal counsel from a kindergartener. The "careless comments" made were the last two screenshots, as they point out specifically that judicial misconduct took place and unfortunately, Mr. Haygood is completely and utterly incapable of doing his job properly. Freedom of speech had absolutely nothing to do in this case, all he needed to do was cite TFC Sec.157.167-168 and we would have gotten more than he gave us. I spoke to Robert Garza himself as he cared more about this than Mr. Haygood did over the course of 3 years. On top of this, no bills have been sent, and after speaking with Lane MULTIPLE TIMES he stated he did not need more of a retainer. He simply does not care and doesn't want to do these cases anymore. Instead of saying that, he made the situation worse than if my husband represented himself and completely botched an easy slam dunk case that even the opposing counsel assumed they had no chance in winning. It's even more pathetic that he only decided to FINALLY get back to us after we contacted his new office with KURK.
Lane Haygood is the BEST!!! He fought for my Mom and won her case! I’d recommend him over anyone hands down!!!!

My husband and I have had the absolute pleasure of having Lane represent us in both of our custody cases. Both cases have gone over a year each. He is a very knowledgeable family law attorney, and my personal opinion an amazing person. It was a true blessing to have found him. He has represented us both well. We both highly recommend him.
Haywood is an embarrassment to the practice of law and what’s right for children. If you use him, you’re rolling the dice with the well being of your family.
Great attorney, fighting for what's just!

reviews.text:
I have never experienced such unprofessional,  disgraceful service from a person of this caliber.. Ms. Curry scheduled me for an appt on a day before set appt,  I go to appt, and Ms. Curry herself comes up to me confused as to why I was there.. I explained to her that she scheduled this a day earlier and she looked at me like i was crazy o imposing and said she was doing a seminar and she didn't check her calendar.. I could not believe the level of inconsideration and just overall unprofessionalism.. It was absolutely mind boggling to me that she could treat me like this when I was actually going to hire this lady to represent me that day.
THANK GOD I DIDN'T!! DEFINITELY DO NOT NEED THIS TYPE OF REPRESENTATION

Ms. Curry stated alot of untruthful comments and defense as to what actually took place.. 1st of all I did not call,  ms curry called me- pictures enclosed to prove this.. Also I did not just walk away.. I actually was approached by ms curry and I was asked why I was there.. I explained to ms curry that I was there for appointment set just a day before,  I explained my situation, - and to my surprise ms curry seemed dumbfounded.. At that point,  so was I and I did let her know it's ok, and I was going to seek legal representation somewhere else.. This is the truth,  this is how it really happened...
reviews.ownerResponse: Mr. Lopez called me after 6 p.m. the night before.  I was not in my office.  I was on my personal time.  I do not recall setting an appointment with him.  I did not have an appointment on my calendar.  Again, I was not in my office when he called.  I guess it is unprofessional to answer a call after hours but I try to help my clients when they need help.  Majority of my consultations are by phone.  If he spoke to me by phone, then I could have given him a consultation by phone.  When he showed up in my office, I tried to help him and asked him some questions to see what I needed to do but he just got up, told me 'no' and walked out of my office.  He did not give me a chance to do anything.  I am very passionate about my law practice and giving my clients what they need to accomplish their goals.  I am sorry that Mr. Lopez did not give me the chance and just walked out while I was talking to him.
Thank you for the excellent review!  I try my best!

reviews.text:
Ms.Curry was recommended to me by another Odessa law firm, which did not handle the type of case I was inquiring about.After leaving my name & phone number with her answering service, Ms.Curry called me back in less than an hour.After briefly discussing with Ms.Curry my legal concerns, she asked that I email to her a copy of the information I was concerned about. Ms. Curry told me it might be a couple of days before she could get back to me. About three hours later, Ms. Curry emailed me, and basically solved the legal concerns I had with the information I had initially emailed to her. During our phone conversations or email exchanges, Ms.Curry never mentioned anything about how much her feel(s) would be for providing her legal help! She never charged me one red penny for her services! Ms.Curry, if you are reading this, please be advised that I greatly appreciated your help in answering my questions. I'm praying that you have a long and prosperous business career. I cannot thank you enough for your service. May God bless you, your business and your family.

Regards,
Ronnie C.
Austin TX

reviews.text:
There is no pain like losing a family member in a car accident and no amount of money could bring them back. One phone call changed our lives forever. In the middle of grief, we were faced with decisions, paperwork, and insurance companies that didn’t see the person we lost, they saw a claim.

We needed someone who understood that this wasn’t just a case. This was our family. During the darkest season of our lives, our attorneys at Zehl & Associates brought strength, guidance, and unwavering support. We will be forever grateful for their help.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are honored to have provided the strength and support needed during such a challenging time. Your words inspire our Midland legal team to continue our commitment to compassionately serving families like yours. Thank you for your heartfelt review.

reviews.text: I’m not one to leave reviews, but this one is personal. My family was impacted by a work-related incident, and our world turned upside down overnight. I never thought I’d need an attorney, but I knew I needed someone who would truly fight for us and not treat our case like just another file. From the first call, Zehl & Associates made it clear we mattered. They were communicative, compassionate, and relentless. If you’re searching for the right firm during a hard time, stop looking. You’ve found it.
reviews.ownerResponse: We can't tell you how much we are honored to have made a difference during such a challenging time for your family. Your words mean the world to us, and we're thrilled we could fight tirelessly for you. Thank you so much for the wonderfully heartfelt review.

reviews.text: When the unimaginable happens, you can feel lost and unsure of what steps to take. In moments like that, it’s easy to feel overwhelmed. From the very beginning, the professionals at Zehl & Associates made it clear that I was not alone. They were incredibly helpful and thorough in explaining what the firm provides, taking the time to answer questions and guide me through the process. What stood out most was how genuinely they seemed to care, it never felt scripted or transactional. Their compassion and professionalism made everything feel real and trustworthy. If I ever find myself in a car accident, Zehl & Associates would be the first firm I call.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are so happy to hear that our team could provide the support and care you needed during a difficult time. Your kind words about our compassion and professionalism mean the world to us. Thank you, Coral, for the wonderful review!

I wasn’t sure that I actually needed an accident lawyer when I got into my wreck originally. But at my friend’s recommendation, I got into contact with Zehl within a day.

They were kind and understanding, and walked me through my courses of action, as well as the reasoning behind them. They told me why I needed to do what I was doing like I was a human being. They kept me updated on my case the entire time, and by the end of the process, I felt like I couldn’t have been handled by a better team. They make a profit from their work (despite it being free for me) but they genuinely care about their clients like no other company I’ve ever worked with. Thank you Mr Zehl!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Isaiah: thank you so much for taking the time to share this!

I’m glad our team was able to walk you through each step, explain the “why” behind the strategy, and keep you updated throughout—everyone deserves to be treated like a human being, not a file number.

For clarity, we work on a contingency-fee basis, which means no upfront costs and we only get paid if we win; the goal is for you to focus on healing while we handle the rest.

Your kind words mean a lot, and I’ll make sure the team hears them. If you ever need anything—questions now or help in the future—we’re here for you. Wishing you a continued, full recovery.

I wanted to take a moment to share my experience with Kevin Miller and the team at Miller and Bicklien. Kevin has handled two of my car accident cases, and on another occasion, he went above and beyond by stepping in to help with a case he was not obligated to assist with. The level of service and dedication I have received from them has been truly exceptional.

Additionally, I would like to give a special shout out to their legal secretary, Miss Pat, who has been absolutely amazing throughout the entire process. Kevin is not only highly professional but also a genuinely good person inside and out. He is straightforward, honest, and tells you what you need to hear rather than just what you want to hear.

I cannot express enough how grateful I am for their support and expertise. If you ever find yourself in need of legal assistance, I highly recommend reaching out to Miller and Bicklien.

Royce Bicklein did a great job for my kids and I.  In dealing with tragedy of the sudden loss of my husband, I am so grateful for his competency, persistence, and results. Things moved quickly and he worked diligently to get the job done.  I highly recommend Royce and his firm.

I had an excellent experience working with Royce Bicklein. From the start, they were professional, knowledgeable, and genuinely cared about my situation. They took the time to explain every detail clearly and kept me informed through every step of the process.

Their expertise and attention to detail gave me confidence that my case was in good hands. Miller & Bicklein has always been responsive to my questions and went above and beyond to achieve the best possible outcome.

I highly recommend Miller & Bicklein and their team to anyone in need of a dedicated, trustworthy, and results-driven attorney. Truly one of the best in their field! I have used their firm multiple times and without a doubt they are the best at what they do. I would not hesitate to recommend this firm to anyone. Never be alone with Miller & Bicklein, they are not at your side, they stand in front of you.

They always responded with answers to any questions we had, gave us good and honest advice and fought for what we deserved. I highly recommend this law firm to anyone seeking a lawyer or firm. Just an incredible team! Even Brenda the assistant was always available and so quick to respond. We love them!

Royce Bicklein has been my attorney for the past three years. His office keeps me updated on everything that’s going on, and he returns calls and emails very professionally and promptly. He is always swinging for the fences when we have court cases with other attorneys for Workers’ Compensation. Over the past three years, I have seen his dedication to his work and his clients. I have nothing but the utmost respect for Royce and his outstanding performance on my behalf. If you need someone to represent you for Workers’ Compensation or any other legal matters, Miller and Bicklein will do their best to hit the ball out of the park for you. Thank you, Royce, for all your hard work—we are still working together to get other matters resolved.
I had a great experience using this law firm. They answered my many questions and provided me with the guidance needed to win my case.

“When I first injured my shoulder and my case began back in July 2024, I was overwhelmed. I didn’t know where things were headed and felt like the odds were stacked against me. For months it seemed like I was just stuck, waiting, and losing hope. That’s when Tobey Draper stepped in, and everything changed.

From day one, Tobey made it clear that he was in my corner. He didn’t just take on my case — he took on my fight. He was thorough, he explained things in a way I could understand, and he made me feel like I wasn’t just another file on his desk. He carried the weight of the legal side so I could focus on getting through the physical and emotional side of my injury.

What stood out the most was his determination. He saw the obstacles, but he didn’t let them stop him. He pushed forward, kept me updated every step of the way, and never once made me feel forgotten. When the day finally came, he delivered. After more than a year of struggle, Tobey brought me the win I had been waiting for.

If you are searching for an attorney who will fight for you like it’s personal, who won’t let you get lost in the system, and who knows how to deliver results when it matters — look no further than Tobey Draper. I’ll never forget the difference he made in my life, and I’ll always be grateful that he was the one standing beside me.”

I had a contractor trying to charge more than the agreed amount without approving the extra charges before the work was done. I contacted the Kemmy law firm and they reviewed my contract and helped walk my through how to handle. I ended up paying only what was contracted. Thank you Tommy Kemmy for helping me with this. I was so stressed before contacting them! Highly recomend this law firm.

I contacted Kemmy Law Firm and spoke with Thomas Kemmy about the death of my step-father at Hendrick Hospital.  Though I do not agree with their decision not to take our case, I was impressed with talking to Mr. Kemmy.   He was the first lawyer to actually speak with me and he explained why our case would be extremely hard to persue through the courts and that if the case failed to be proven then the cost would fall back on the family.  HE took time to fully explain how Texas protects hospitals and that a drug related death is very hard to prove.  Though I feel that hospital should be sued, Mr. Kemmy spoke, explained all things clearly to me and did not discourage us from  speaking with another attorney----BUT he did do what noone else had, he fully expained what had to be proven for a court case in Texas.   Yes, I would recommend a person speak with him if they feel they need a lawyer.  It is very clear they know what they are talking about and are not afraid to speak with a person or take time to explain the court proceedings.

Ben Kemmy and his awesome  staff showed a deep understanding of my personal situation and demonstrated empathy throughout the legal process. This helped me a great deal to get through this difficult time. I recommend Kemmy Law Firm to all who need the services .

Mr. Kemmy comes from good stock and was referred to us by one of the best. And if he's good enough for her to lay her reputation on the line, he's good enough for me. Nick was very open and transparent, and shared some of our frustrations. We were very please with him representing us. Thanks again Nick.

Everyone we worked with was amazing. They were so patient and explained everything in detail. They worked with my mom and then when she passed away the game plan changed and they made sure to explain everything. We were blessed to have them on our team. I would highly recommend them.

They are all wonderful people. They're there to help you with any questions you may have and take the time to explain every part of the procedure. I would definitely recommend them to my friends and family.

Tom and Danny represented me in a trucking accident. It is very hard to write a review that expresses just how phenomenal they both are. Some words that come to mind are: extraordinary,  fantastic,  outstanding, remarkable, miraculous, substantial, wonderful, rare, and most important of all caring. These guys put their whole heart into our case.
When Tom first returned my phone call,  he told me that he had no intention of taking on my case because it seemed like we just rear ended the back of a semi truck. After giving me a chance to explain what really happened,  he wanted to help me 100%. That is exactly what Tom and Danny did. From beginning to end, they never stopped trying to prove our innocence.  I had never experienced going through a law suit,  and hoped I never had to, but I am so thankful I had Tom and Danny to represent my husband and I.  I would use them again, no doubt, if the opportunity ever presented itself again. I would recommend Kemmy Law Firm to anyone needing an attorney for accident and injury.  My husband and I are looking forward to meeting Tom and Danny.  They did things for us our own family wouldn't do. They were there for us 1000%. They are the kind of people who would give anyone the shirt off their back if you needed it. They do everything and more for you when it comes to representing a client. Again, I would never call anyone else if i had an accident or injury I needed help with. They left me speechless. They worded in a very timely manor.
To Tom and Danny,  we thank you from the bottom of our hearts and we can't wait to meet you in San Antonio.  Cheers!

Erin and Jacob Coldiron

reviews.text:
I was very hesitant at first to pursue legal counsel. I wasn’t trying to “get money” or seek more than I deserved, like people often assume. But after getting the runaround from multiple doctors’ offices in Lubbock who wouldn’t see car accident–related injuries, I realized I needed help.

I had never heard of Chad Jones Law Firm before, and honestly, I was afraid of being taken advantage of. However, after months of pain, feeling limited in my daily life, and not knowing how to navigate the process, Chad Jones Law Firm stepped in and took so much of the stress off my shoulders.

Chris was an incredible case manager. He was attentive, empathetic, compassionate, and reassuring every step of the way. Through constant life changes — moving, starting a new job, and attending multiple doctor appointments — Chris and the team made the process feel manageable and far less overwhelming.

I wouldn’t have known I was one of his first cases if he hadn’t mentioned it; his professionalism and dedication were evident from the start. You see billboards and commercials for injury law firms everywhere, but speaking from personal experience, if I or anyone I know ever needed an injury attorney, I would confidently recommend Chad Jones Law Firm.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for sharing your experience with us! We're so pleased to know that Chris and the team could provide the support you needed during such a challenging time. It's our goal to make our clients feel comfortable and cared for throughout the entire process. If there's anything else we can do for you or your loved ones, we're here to help.

reviews.text: I would very well recommend working with paralegal Bell Sanchez and attorney Manuel Hernandez for any injury lawsuit. From the moment i got home from the hospital and found out the insurance from the person responsible for my accident was not willing to pay for any of my medical bills or my vehicle, I immediately called Mr. Hernandez. Not knowing what to expect, that same day Mr. Hernandez visited me at my home considering i had been seriously injured. He explained the process of the lawsuit and the next steps that needed to be taken and reassured me that everything would be okay. During the two years of the lawsuit, I endured a total of 4 surgeries, and almost 2 years of physical therapy. The expenses that came along after my accident were substantial, but Manuel and Bell accompanied me every step of the way, including in the event i needed help to cover any of my medical appointment costs. They were amazing people to work with, they responded in a timely manner, answered any questions i had, and were even there when i just needed someone to talk to. As much as i like and appreciate Bell and Manny, I hope i never have to use their services again -but if i do, they will be the first people i will call (besides my husband of course). Thank you Bell and Manny so much, it was a pleasure working with you!
reviews.ownerResponse: After all you have endured, we hope you never have to use our services again as well; however, we are happy to have been able to help you work through these tough times.   Our personal injury attorneys are willing to go the "extra mile" in order to help our clients.   We frequently make home or hospital visits because that is what the clients need and its the right thing to do.  When we get to know our clients, we are able to represent them better and help secure the most money possible for a recovery.

If you want someone who will fight for you hire this firm. I am so happy I did. Thank you so much Christine and Terri I truly appreciate it and my son is so happy. Thanks again.

Rick, Janette, and Valeria are TOP NOTCH! They are extremely friendly and always ready to assist or answer any questions you have regarding your case. Definitely worth every penny in my opinion!

Money comes and goes but the feeling of anxiety and not knowing what to do, where to go or who to call is a feeling I can’t describe. The relief of knowing I had a professional like Rick Navarrete by my side is a feeling I can’t ever repay.

I would like to publicly recognize Rick and his practice for not only being ethical and going above and beyond in a very short notice (I had an emergency hearing) but carrying themselves with integrity. He made it easy to explain my situation, actively listened, and his advice won my case!

His team was prepared and ready. His knowledge of the law and ability to apply it is what sets him apart from the rest. I wouldn’t have anyone else fighting by my side.

Rick was able to successfully get my son back to me and I will forever be thankful.

I got screwed over 100% the attorney that I was talking to asked was this your attorney or your ex-wives attorney because if it was your attorney, she completely screwed you over with child support, modification, and sale of the home. And I agree. The final divorce decree was not explained to me on payments, modification or anything else. I thought the attorneys job was to read through it and explain to me I was just told to sign. It was my fault for not reading, but that’s why you pay the attorney to read it and explain it to you before signing If you’re a guy fighting for custody go somewhere else I showed proof that my ex was not a good mother and an alcoholic and even with that, it seems like they took my ex’s over my side, even though I was their client so if you’re a man, please go somewhere else. Trust me on this.

Fortunately I was represented by Mr. Rick Navarrete in my case, he really knows his stuff and will do everything in his power to fight for you. Extremely satisfied with the outcome. My case was completely dismissed and i can move on with my life ,thanks to him.

The result was 100% in our favor, and now my son lives in Midland, I have JMC, and have full visitation rights plus elections. I can't thank her (and her team Terri and Janette) enough, it would not have been possible without her representation.

Made an appointment for a consultation with Christine of $150 she was late 20min and unapologetic Mr. Rick was kind enough to take over while she was busy to speed up the appointment just to find her sitting next to me without introducing herself when I turned around didn’t even notice she was there until I turned around. She told me she charges over $6000 for a visitation case in midland and in my case that had already started in bell county already half way she would charge way over $10,000. This was the second appointment I had tried to make at this firm first time they couldn’t because I didn’t reside in midland over 6 months waited till I was over the 6months and they took me in the consultation appointment only to find out I wasted my time and they couldn’t take my case unless I paid over 10,000 and she stated they wouldn’t even be familiar to that county even if they could I appreciate the honesty but if that was the case why lead me on 6months to finally book an appointment to waste my time and then didn’t appreciate the lateness and unapologetic attitude.         I’m glad I was able to find another attorney who was reassuring and upfront and was able to hear my concerns with my current case and navigate me in the right direction. Can’t speak for this firms ability to preform in a case but first impressions are everything and I was not impressed.

reviews.text:
Great Attorney - On the Path to Dismissal!

I had the privilege of working with Alan B. Harris for my legal case, and I'm incredibly pleased with the progress we've made so far. From the beginning, Alan has demonstrated exceptional professionalism and dedication to my case.

My situation was not straightforward, and Alan handled it with impressive expertise and strategic thinking. He kept me well-informed throughout the process, explaining each step and making sure I understood the complexities involved.

Thanks to Alan's hard work and skill, we are on track for a dismissal! While there are still a few contingencies to be addressed, I am confident that Alan has laid the groundwork for a successful resolution.

I'm grateful for the support and guidance provided by Alan B. Harris. He has shown genuine care for my case and has been transparent about the remaining steps needed for dismissal.

I wholeheartedly recommend Alan B. Harris to anyone seeking legal representation. His commitment to achieving the best possible outcome is evident, and I trust that with his guidance, we will achieve the desired result.

Thank you, Alan B. Harris, for your hard work, and I look forward to finalizing the dismissal of my case with your help!

Tanya Bidwell is an outstanding tax attorney in Midland. She is knowledgeable, responsive, and incredibly thorough. Tax issues can be stressful and confusing, but Tanya explains everything clearly and lays out practical options without any pressure or fluff.

She is professional, detail-oriented, and clearly knows her way around both IRS matters and complex tax situations. If you’re dealing with a tax problem and want an attorney who is sharp, honest, and dependable, I highly recommend Tanya Bidwell.

Tanya is also an excellent  advocate in federal court where she handles some of the most complex and difficult federal criminal defense issues.  She knows her stuff and is highly capable at trial.

⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Tanya is hands down one of the best. She’s sharp, straightforward, and truly cares about her clients. She took my situation seriously from the start and went above and beyond to fight for me and it made all the difference.
She made sure I understood every step, never left me in the dark, and gave me a sense of peace during one of the most stressful times in my life. If you need someone who will show up, fight smart, and actually stand by you. Tanya is it. I can’t recommend her enough, and I’ll always be grateful. Thank you!

I have seen her work with people from all walks of life- from professionals to the homeless- with equal care and respect.  She is great in Court- very eloquent- and she gets results.

All the reviews are coming from males- so as a woman making a review- I can tell you my first hand experience with Shane Stokes. Shane Stokes was a court-appointed Amicus Attorney who told the judge to terminate all my rights based on the opposing attorneys evidence. I have no idea what was in this evidence as it was handed to me the minute we started Court. Shane Stokes never took one minute to talk to me but I know that he spent much time talking with the opposing side and made an EXTREMELY biased report. I highly suggest you avoid hiring this extremely dangerous person. Also, if you do some background work on him you will find that he is not even qualified to make these types of decisions in peoples life. I cannot speak on the services of the other attorneys, but I can speak on behalf of the experience I had with Shane, a very saddening and scary one.
Hire them!!
Best choice I made to hire them!

The only thing I didn't like was on some very rare occasions it is hard to get a hold of him but he is a good lawyer. He kept me out of prison with 7 years probation. Id definitely go back and hire him again. I believe he got me the best outcome given my situation. Thank you don
Mr Don Fletcher is an Excellent Attorney & even though I’m not in Texas during this time he went above and beyond to help me and I will be forever grateful.

I strongly advise anyone considering Don R. Fletcher, Attorney at Law, to look elsewhere. My experience with him has been nothing short of frustrating and unprofessional, even for something as simple as a speeding ticket.

Mr. Fletcher is nearly impossible to get ahold of. He doesn’t answer phone calls, rarely responds to emails (if at all), and provides zero follow-up after court appearances. I had to chase his office for updates, and when I finally got him on the phone, he cursed me out for expressing frustration, completely inappropriate behavior from someone in his position.

To make matters worse, he attempted to cover his lack of communication by misrepresenting facts in official court filings, claiming I ignored requests I never received. He knew his emails were going to my junk folder and still failed to follow up by phone or text, despite knowing the urgency of the situation.

He even closed one of his rude emails with a vaguely threatening statement: “Also, if you would like to discuss the matter further, please feel free to come by and we can meet in person. Any time.” I found this tone unprofessional and inappropriate, especially considering the context of his entire message.

If you value your time, peace of mind, and a basic level of professionalism, do yourself a favor and find a different attorney. This office will give you the runaround and leave you feeling ignored, misled, and disrespected.
Don and Leann helped me get a ticket I got in Odessa off my record. They are great to work with and kept me informed of everything that was going on with my case.

I paid him. It took 2 years for him to get the evidence that I went over and I decided to go to trial. The offer that I got from the D.A. was 9 years felony probation, for not committing a crime. He stepped down as my lawyer as I did not have the money to pay for a trial. He then became my court appointed lawyer. We went to court and the case was dropped due to lack of evidence. I think he would have done a good job if he was not so overwhelmed with cases.

Big sarcastic props to the OPD for doing their "job"  and this law firm for really carrying out their professional service of personal injury law. reviews.text: This is the WORST "lawyer" you can find. Only giving her a 1 star because we can't do 0. We hired her to help us with my husbands child custody/support. He has had our kids their entire lives but biological mother has always filed child support against him (how? who knows). We went with all the proof and just wanted to get full custody and the egg donor on supervised visitation only. Well all she ever did was request money over and over. We paid over $7000. She never prepped for court never spoke with my husband to find out what was the back story NOTHING! At court she wasn't fighting for my husband just wanted him to pay back child support even though we had proof that he always had the kids. Finally I told her in front of the state representative to offer to the egg donor to clear the back child support and we would waive asking for child support from her. Then and ONLY then did she speak up for something in favor of my husband. She is the worst attorney ever! Save your money and find someone else!!!!

My husband was a client of Laura Carpenter.  Mrs. Carpenter is the best family law attorney we have ever worked with. She took a year to get us a court date we paid 4800 to get started  and she cancel and made us pay 1500 to to the next court date then she cancel because her husband had a bad car accident last week 5-16-23 the same date as our court date and now she book us for next month but now she wants 850 dollars more to cover her fees when she was the one that cancel we drove 6 hours to be there lost two days of work and our kids lost two days of school now she threatened us to withdrawal her self from the case and she already canceled over her husband’s car accident the next court because we questioned the why we had to pay when it was her that clove her husbands this is how she treats women that seek her help to get child support from the kids dad just a nasty experience she stealing from the kids child support money not from the kids mom
reviews.ownerResponse: We did have to move hearings on that date because of a family emergency, but we made sure that nobody had to pay any extra fees due to the hearings being moved.  Anyone that received a bill was for money they already owed, not extra money due to moved hearings.  If any of our clients feel there is an error they should contact our office to discuss it, but we are only able to discuss cases and invoices with people that are actually our clients since confidentiality prevents us from discussing anything with outside parties.

I believe this attorney is brilliant from my initial discussion and from hearing his plan for my case. The downside is the execution and communication. You will not hear a blip about your case; follow ups with the office are as useless as serenading a tree for affection. They will not file any motions, no updates. Utter silence. To date I’m still in awe how someone can consciously lie over and over that a motion has been filed or item x has been done. I read the negative reviews before engaging the firm but I parsed on them, rationalising :”of course not everyone is happy” in such an industry. I loved how he engaged the reviewers and thought this vet is an astute attorney and was going to bring that fiery fury in court. I was wrong. It was my fault to be fooled. I’m glad I moved on and my case turned up excellent with a different attorney.  I reckon you’ll be more likely to get a response from them when you post here, be struck by lightning 4x in a minute than ever getting a linear and coherent plan about your case.

Update:
I stand by my statement above. If you decide this firm is your attorney, by all means I wish and pray that each one of these 1stars is wrong. I wish you all the best and hope not only will the attorneys will be prudent, straightforward and prompt in communication but also have integrity and  ACTUALLY do what they promise rather than haggle with clients over reviews. All the best out there

reviews.text: This lawyer is the biggest scammer in the United States. He said he charged 30 and charged 50 and also charged 200 for a consultation. I don't recommend him.
reviews.ownerResponse:
You are impressive, Mr. Valdes; truly impressive. I now understand that the things that have happened to you are not the fault of those who previously assisted you, but your own. I recommend that you stop playing games and do things the right way so that things go well for you. My clients know who I am and leave my office fully informed and empowered, without needing to pay attention to your unfounded allegations. You are harming serious people who want to resolve their immigration issues in this country, particularly my Cuban brothers and sisters. You paid me for a consultation after crying for a week because you had to pay, because, according to you, "I've never paid." You called me and even then, you asked me, "How do I know this isn't spam?" You finally paid for the consultation, and despite it being a Saturday, I paused a family activity and called you from my cell phone, even though we don't work Saturdays. I spoke with you for 45 minutes. You were convinced and satisfied that I provided you with the correct guidance and made the decision to "move" to Midland and hire my services.

Then he showed up at my office without an appointment, and I saw him again for about an hour. I examined the file he brought with him and reviewed all the steps he had taken, and I listened to all his complaints about how, according to him, he had been defrauded, etc.

With my characteristic calm, I explained his process since entering this country, the current regulations regarding the actions taken by CBP, ICE, and USCIS. I explained the requirements for applying for adjustment of status through the Cuban Adjustment Act and even showed him the application instructions. I also took the time to explain and clarify the Miami judge's decision and its effects specifically on the Cuban people. He left my office enthusiastic, polite, and happy, like the vast majority of my clients. But something happened. When ICE asked him for the information needed to process his case, he got cold feet. (Anyone who understands Hispanic will get it.) What happened, Mr. Valdés? Don't you have what ICE asked for? For reasons we know, but out of courtesy we won't detail them here, you decided to withdraw your case from our office. Therefore, despite our no-refund policy, I decided to return your money and only charge you for the administrative services performed up to that point, such as opening the case, creating your file, making copies, sending documents by mail, etc. Even so, you have the audacity to write what you wrote. Your audacity is astounding. Whatever you might say on this page says more about you than about me, and my conscience is clear and I sleep soundly. I wish you much success with your case, and I advise you to act with integrity in all your dealings; you will surely fare better.

I had a very disappointing experience with Katy during my divorce case, which involved custody of my children. From the very beginning, she was unprofessional and unsympathetic. Whenever I scheduled a meeting with her to discuss questions or concerns about the case, I left feeling more confused and hopeless than when I arrived. At our first temporary hearing, she referred to me as her “problem child” which was completely inappropriate and hurtful during an already emotional time. When I confronted her about it she said, “I meant being my biggest case”.

Katy frequently spoke negatively about other clients and even her own staff in front of me, which raised serious concerns about her professionalism and discretion. The most shocking was when she showed up to a scheduled Zoom mediation wearing a night robe—an unacceptable and disrespectful display of unprofessionalism.

She constantly talked down to me and made me feel like a transaction, not a valued client. If you’re hoping she’ll fight for what is right and just—which is the very reason most people hire an attorney—you’ll be disappointed. She’s not the “shark in shallow water” that others claim she is. She does the bare minimum, and if you ask her to go above that, it’s either “impossible” or you’re told you’re asking too much. Despite this, she continued to send invoices to replenish my retainer—two in total—without delivering results or showing basic respect. I ultimately made the decision to fire her when the third one was sent, I simply couldn’t justify paying another penny to be disrespected and unsupported.

Katy fought an aggressive fight for me and my daughter, and I couldn’t be more grateful. I really appreciate that she is a mother herself—she has the heart and strength of a lion when it comes to protecting families. She was fierce, determined, and truly cared about the outcome of my case. I highly recommend her to anyone who needs someone who will fight with passion and dedication.
Katy is fierce in the courtroom! She is very knowledgeable and she will fight for you. She has a fantastic team around her. They are helpful, empathetic, thorough and attentive.

John and Andrew are excellent attorneys. I work with attorneys all the time in my career and never imagined I would need one...not a criminal one anyway. When I did end up in need, I knew of plenty attorneys that I didn't want representing me, but none that I actually did want.
In May of 2019 I was arrested due some false allegations against me. I heard about Mr. Wolf from a friend and contacted him immediately. After talking to John, and his partner Andrew, I decided they were the right choice for me and for my case. They immediately went to work for me. They met with me, spoke with me on the phone, texted, and responded to emails throughout the day and after hours, whenever I needed it. There was nothing I was in want for.
John, Andrew, and I decided to fight my case at the front end with the grand jury. This is no small feat, as grand juries usually only hear from the prosecutor. It took nearly a year and a half for the prosecutor to take my case to the grand jury. John and Andrew put together a "defense packet" and were able to get it pushed through so that the grand jury could review it. This is almost unheard of here in small town West Texas. When the case came back as officially a No-Bill, Mr. Wolf and Mr. Stallings both called me immediately to let me know.
I feel confident that we would have won this case in a trial, and for me, there was no other option. I was innocent and not about to plea in any other way. Both John and Andrew agreed and never tried to persuade me otherwise. John and Andrew's hard work spared us the trauma, time, humiliations and yes, money, that a trial would have brought.
They are still doing some work on expungement for me on my case, and there is absolutely nobody I would trust more.
If you need a good criminal attorney I would definitely look into hiring Wolf & Stallings.
John Wolf is amazing. Truly Professional and very caring. Thankful to have been blessed with him

These guys are amazing. Going into the courtroom with these guys is the first time I've ever been in a courtroom and not feltl completely helpless and alone. reviews.text: Well I will tell you when I Finley found this law Firm l had already been in front of the Judge here in Texas and was told that l needed representation in this case well l told the Judge right there that I was prepared to plead not guilty and I was told that I was early with my plea so I had been looking for four months for some one to represent me for l was broke and I was waiting on someone founds that were coming in in a few months I was told that I needed representation the next time I appeared or I’d be in contempt of court well I didn’t need that too Keith and Lorfing I sent them a copy of my money that was coming in and they reviewed it and said that they could wait for my money to come in to which was a couple months out. All I needed to do was find a down payment and that they would represent me and this was the day before I was to appear for the third time in court here in Texas never been to court in Texas. They do a different here. It took me a while to figure So needless to say, they represented me and did a damn good job and everybody’s happy they all got dismissed. Everybody got paid. I’m allowed to go home after damn near seven months seven months almost 8. I’m allowed to go home. Finally great deal. I tipped my hat To the crew involved in all this made it quite easy we just had a little couple little mishaps along the way nothing big it was all taken care of I recommend them. They’re honest people now that’s hard to find these days honest people I couldn’t find anybody would wait for money and I made too much money to get a quarter point. I was in trouble. I was in trouble. They wouldn’t let me represent myself we’re done with it. And I’m very happy with the verdict Kinda, you would think kind of simple but anyway my hats off to all you involved thank you very much Monte Smith

reviews.text:
I initially reached out to Brandi just days before my sentencing. Despite the time crunch, she immediately stepped in, got my sentencing pushed back, and used that time to thoroughly prepare herself and her team. I was set for sentencing on September 2, 2025, with an offense base level of 41 points. Through her strategic arguments and deep understanding of the law, she was able to get it reduced to 25 points during trial.
Brandi went beyond just the legal aspects—she spoke passionately about my life story and the circumstances that led to my actions. Her ability to humanize my situation and connect with the court made a real impact. As a result, the judge sentenced me to just 32 months, with self-surrender and placement at the prison/camp of my choice—an outcome I never imagined possible.
I am beyond grateful for Brandi and the entire team at the Keith & Lorfing Law Firm. Their dedication, legal expertise, and unwavering support changed the course of my life. They fought hard, won every objection, and ultimately delivered a result that was far better than expected.

We were given Gaven's information from someone who had been "personally victimized" by him on the stand (this is said jokingly as in they were under cross examination and he ate them alive.) Which this is exactly what we needed in our intervention case going against CPS and bio parent who had a shark of a lawyer. We had called 3 other lawyers who wouldn't take the case because honestly it was a crap show. But not Gaven. He accepted the challenge. Although the case went in a way none of us expected. In the short amount of time he was on the case he was able to get our intervention granted and helped us in mediation and get a mediation agreement that has shocked almost everyone involved. If we ever have another family law issue we will be calling Gaven to have him in our corner.

I’ve used Gaven Norris twice. Both times, he came through for me. He has done nothing but gotten better at his practice and treating his customers like family. He is knowledgeable, and has the right attitude and approach to each case. Very affordable in my opinion. Worth every penny. If you need a great family lawyer, that can help with custody, divorce, and many other things, call Gaven Norris.

I am deeply grateful for the guidance and protection I received thru the most difficult years of our lives. Because of his advocacy, I was able to keep my home and everything that rightfully belonged to me , none of it was touched. What truly set Gaven apart was accessibility and communication. Gaven is professional, strategic, and genuinely invested in his clients. I would highly recommend him to anyone who needs an attorney who will stand firm, protect your interests, and guide you with care during the hardest moments.

Having to go to court is not an experience my family ever wanted to go through. However, we are very grateful for having found Gaven. Gaven is very professional, courteous, thoughtful, and intelligent. He knows his craft very well and carries himself with confidence and grace. From the very start, Gaven took the time to listen carefully & guided the whole process while making it comfortable to be able to express our thoughts and concerns. He was very punctual with scheduled calls and always made time to answer our calls, even if he was busy and even on the weekend. His calm demeanor made everything very easy and he always treated us more like family and not like a customer. His reputation for being a great lawyer is well earned. My family was so impressed to observe him juggle multiple cases, in which he remembered all the info for every client, and never got stressed or overwhelmed. He made time to greet everyone at the courthouse with a real, genuine smile and knew everyone by name while being humble and pleasant to be around. On top of that, he does all this while raising a very young family of his own. I respect Gaven for being a Christian man in an industry that has a reputation for being cutthroat. He’s the exact opposite of the stereotypical lawyer and I’m glad we found him to represent us. Thank you Gaven for all you did. I feel like we made a friend who truly had our best interest at heart and we’re grateful for all the effort you put into this case for us. Anyone who is looking for a lawyer would be crazy to hire anyone else.
The Gaven Norris Law Firm, has helped me and continues to help me with all my needs. Every Problem I have he has found a solution for. Thank you Mr Norris.

The Gaven Norris Law Office walked with me through one of the most emotional journeys of my life. I would recommend Mr Gavin Norris to everyone he's a great Attorney, and he really has his clients best interest at hand, and does such a great job.

Absolutely amazing lawyer have nothing bad to say about anything communication was great when Gaven couldn’t answer the phone Elizabet was there to answer any questions I had.

If you are needing a family attorney this is your guy! Gavin Norris was recommended to my husband and I to hire to gain custody of our 3 grandchildren and he jump through hoops to get it done. Him and his staff keep you updated and are always just a phone call away.. Gavin is a very busy man but he keeps you updated and informed of every move. It took about a month to build the case and about a year and a half to get the mom and dad served (not any fault of Gavin or his office). Mom and dad was ducking and dodging servers and when they would get arestested they would get released before the process server could serve them so we had to keep setting new court dates. We finally had everyone served and was able to go to court and was awarded sole conservatorship of the 3 grandchildren. We will use him on any future issues that arise.
Gavin and his team are the best in Odessa they have always been supportive and Gavin has always had my back words can’t explain how grateful I am for him and his team ❤️🙏

We recently used Gaven Norris to represent us for a civil suit in regards to a known mental health facility in town when they had given my husband and I the run around and tried to keep him longer than what was necessary or what followed the law. Gaven fought hard and diligently for our family. The court case last barely a few minutes do to the preparation and records Gaven, Tasha, and Elizibet were able to get in the short amount of time provided. My husband was released less than a couple hours later. They fought for Micah and our family every step of the way. I highly suggest using him for ALL case needs

☆☆☆☆☆
I’m extremely disappointed in the representation I received from this attorney. He was recommended to me, so I had high hopes — but the experience left me feeling misled and unsupported during one of the most stressful times in my life.

Communication with his office was terrible. Calls and emails were rarely answered, and it was nearly impossible to get updates on my case. Even worse, I later discovered that he had not filed my case with the court for months after I retained him — even though he repeatedly told me that he had. I hired him on March 28, and it wasn’t until I personally called the court that I learned nothing had been submitted. The paperwork wasn’t filed until July 15 — more than three months later — without any explanation. That delay deeply affected my custody situation.

At my temporary hearing, I ended up with a very one-sided custody arrangement that I’m now trying to reverse with new attorneys. While this attorney is friendly and charismatic in person, I now realize that was misleading. He was often unavailable and even out of town during key parts of my case. He simply did not advocate for me the way I needed — or deserved.

If you’re looking for someone who will be responsive, honest, and fight for your case — I strongly recommend looking elsewhere.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for this post. We welcome feed back because we look to improve our services. Most importantly, our office can proudly say that in our representation in this case, we conducted full and complete discovery. When that wasn't responded to, we filed a motion to compel compliance and had a hearing set on that motion, but most importantly, we set and attended a temporary hearing where we were successful in getting a court order making this client the primary parent, getting child support ordered, and preventing the father from being able to take the child across the United States border to Mexico for visitation periods. Most importantly, we made sure this client had direct access to the attorney by giving this client the attorney's cell phone number. We are glad to report that he was able to speak with this client directly via phone calls and text.

We pride our selves on being one of the best law firms in west texas and we will continue to work to provide that service. We understand that we cannot please every client, and in that case, clients should find counsel who is best suited to that client's personality and expectations. Mr. Norris provides realistic expectations for clients and sometimes has to work with clients who may or may not have realistic expectations regarding the legal process. We are happy that this client found representation that best suits her personality and her expectations. Mostly, we are glad that we could help protect her and her child from her worst fears at a temporary hearing in this matter and get a favorable court order for her, in which she agreed to and confirmed with the court.

reviews.text: He is the best attorney in town! I am beyond blessed to have found this man to represent me. When I thought I had no chance in having a good outcome in my case, he showed me different. He is worth every penny. Thank you Gaven Norris!
Mr. Norris is an excellent attorney and his staff are always a joy to interact with. Especially the legal assistant. She always makes me feel heard and respected.

There are no words that can fully express the gratitude I have for Gaven and the Gaven Norris Law Firm. What I went through with my child’s termination of rights case was one of the most emotional chapters of my life. I was scared, overwhelmed, and unsure of what the future held—but from the moment I spoke with Gaven, I finally felt like I wasn’t alone.

He listened to me with compassion, treated me with respect, and never once made me feel like just another case. He took the time to truly understand not only the legal situation, but the emotional weight behind it. Gaven was honest and direct, but also incredibly kind. He gave me strength when I didn’t think I had any left.

In court, he fought with everything he had—not just with skill and experience, but with heart. I knew he genuinely cared about the outcome and about protecting my child’s future. Because of him, I was able to take a deep breath again and have hope.

Gaven didn’t just help me win a case—he helped me reclaim my life, my peace, and my purpose as a parent. If you are going through something that feels too heavy to carry on your own, please know you don’t have to. Gaven will stand with you, fight for you, and care about your family as if it were his own

Not a review I was never ever expecting to make. While having so much trust in this law firm and thinking my family was in good hands we were completely misled. My boyfriend was in need of an attorney and at that time I had been viewing court on fb so I strongly suggested Norris. He seemed to me as someone who was passionate about his job and someone you could trust. I still can't believe what happened to us that I don't even want to write a review. We had been with this Office since 2021 and we felt safe until my boyfriend was served with papers this year.
He was served for not letting his children have visitation with their mother. Our jaws dropped! We didn't even know the kids had visitation with her again. It was months that she had had her visitations all through the holidays and he only found out in late January. Not to get into so much detail on his case but it wasn't because we were being spiteful it's was simply for their safety that mother hadn't had her rights to see her children in years prior to this. At the end our attorney failed us and our children. What we were once told was going to get done we were then hit with something completely different. And it's not that he didn't go to court or anything like that it was just our trust in what Norris said was being done.
All I'm trying to get across is to always watch yourself.
I never wanted to say anything badly about this Office and it bothers me something like this happened but I guess this is the way it is in this field of work.
reviews.ownerResponse: This poster is not a client of the Gaven Norris Law Office, has never been a client of The Gaven Norris Law Office, and this poster does not have children that are the subject of any litigation with The Gaven Norris Law Office. Mr. Norris does pride himself in representing parents of children who need help, especially in emergency situations regarding the safety of children. Mr. Norris, due to his vast family law experience, knows that litigation can take many unexpected twist and turns which require responsive action. Mr. Norris stands ready and equipped to address all unexpected happenings in litigation while attempting to keep clients calm and assured that he will take on any and all unexpected happenings in family law litigation and custody battles.

reviews.ownerResponse: This poster is not a client of The Gaven Norris Law Office but rather the opposing party in child custody litigation. Unfortunately, what this poster has stated is patently false. Court documents and public record would show that a child support enforcement suit was filed against this poster due to this poster being over $27,000 behind in child support payments. The requested range of punishment for failing to pay child support ranges from a fine and probation to up 6 months in jail - or until the full court ordered child support payment is paid in full. This poster, like all litigants who fail to pay court ordered child support, is subject to the full range of court ordered punishment to enforce the payment of child support.
